title: Cultural Delights [Fabric]
description: A Farmer's Delight addon that adds food systems from around the world
body:
![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/448/392/banner.png)
--------------------------------------------------------------

### **A Farmer's Delight addon that adds food systems from around the world.**

#### _Currently working on: Ginger, Beans, Meals, and More!_

####   
**Current crops implemented:** Eggplant, Avocado, Corn, Cucumber, Pickle

#### (_Pickling is only available when the mod [Brewin' and Chewin'](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/brewin-and-chewin) is present)_

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/692/65/untitled.png)**

 

**Some Meal Examples:**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/692/64/untitled1.png)**

 

**Some Squid related items:**

**![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/461/85/screenshot-2022-05-14-135830.png)**

 

**Current Sushi types implemented:** 

(With kelp texture from Bedrock edition_)_

![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/498/256/screenshot-2022-09-22-092833.png)
